questions.question: You are happiest when your partner...

options.text: Gives you small gifts
Helps with your tasks
Hugs you
Spends time talking

questions.question: What hurts the most...

options.text: Forgetting special days
Not helping when you're busy
Rarely touching
Being busy on their phone

questions.question: You feel loved if...

options.text: You're complimented on your appearance
There's a small surprise
You hold hands in public
You go on a date just the two of you

questions.question: You most often give your partner...

options.text: Praise and appreciation
Small gifts
Help with tasks
Hugs and kisses

questions.question: When you're sad, you want your partner to...

options.text: Say everything will be okay
Give you a cheering gift
Help solve your problem
Hug you silently

questions.question: Your ideal partner...

options.text: Often gives praise
Is helpful with actions
Likes physical touch
Always has time

questions.question: What annoys you...

options.text: Never being praised
Never being helped
Rarely holding hands
Always being busy

questions.question: On your anniversary, you want...

options.text: A love letter
A special gift
A candlelight dinner while holding hands
To talk until late

questions.question: You usually...

options.text: Often say 'I love you'
Like to give small gifts
Often help without being asked
Often hug for no reason

questions.question: What is most romantic...

options.text: A poem written for you
A surprise bouquet of flowers
Taking a day off to help with your errands
Gazing into your eyes and holding your hand

questions.question: I feel most loved when...

options.text: My partner sincerely compliments me
My partner gives me a special gift
My partner sets aside special time
My partner hugs me tightly

questions.question: When I'm tired, I want...

options.text: My partner to encourage me with words
My partner to help me finish my work
My partner to sit beside me without talking
My partner to massage my shoulders

questions.question: The best gift is...

options.text: A sincere handwritten note
An item I've wanted for a long time
Help when I'm overwhelmed
Quality time without distractions

questions.question: When I'm happy, I...

options.text: Want to tell everyone
Want to give gifts to those close to me
Want to help others
Want to hug those close to me

questions.question: What shows care the most...

options.text: A morning 'good luck' text
Being bought my favorite coffee
Being picked up when it's raining
Watching your favorite movie together

questions.question: The most effective way for your partner to apologize is...

options.text: Verbally admitting their mistake clearly
Bringing food or an apology gift
Doing household chores to make up for it
Sitting together and discussing it thoroughly

questions.question: When you wake up, the best thing from your partner is...

options.text: A sweet good morning chat
Breakfast or coffee made for you
A warm hug before getting out of bed
A casual chat before starting the day

questions.question: You feel ignored if your partner...

options.text: Criticizes you harshly
Shows up empty-handed on important days
Refuses to hold your hand
Cancels a date suddenly

questions.question: The most memorable sign of love for you is...

options.text: An unexpected compliment
A souvenir from a trip
When they take care of you when you're sick
A vacation together without work interruptions

questions.question: When you're stressed from work, you need...

options.text: Calming motivational words
Your favorite food sent to the office
A gentle shoulder massage
A quiet dinner together

questions.question: The best form of support from your partner is...

options.text: Saying 'I believe in you'
Helping to sort out my personal affairs
Hugging me tightly before I go
Accompanying me in preparing everything

questions.question: You consider a relationship boring if...

options.text: There are no more 'I love you's
There are no more small surprises
Your partner becomes selfish and lazy about helping
You rarely spend time together

questions.question: After a big fight, you want your partner to...

options.text: Write a long message about their feelings
Take over my responsibilities for a while
Wipe my tears and hug me
Take me out for some fresh air together

questions.question: A small thing that makes you smile is...

options.text: Hearing them praise you in front of their friends
Seeing them bring your favorite snack
Them opening a door or carrying your bag
Them putting an arm around your shoulder while walking

questions.question: Your dream vacation with your partner is...

options.text: Having deep conversations all night
Shopping for souvenirs together freely
Them planning the entire itinerary
Relaxing and being affectionate all day

questions.question: Your partner's attitude that makes you feel most secure is...

options.text: They verbally reaffirm their commitment
They are always reliable in emergencies
They hold your hand when you're nervous
They prioritize time for you

questions.question: When celebrating a success, you prefer...

options.text: Your partner giving sincere congratulations
Your partner buying an appreciation gift
Your partner hugging and kissing you proudly
Your partner taking you to a celebratory dinner

questions.question: For you, the phrase 'I love you' is most real when...

options.text: Said directly and earnestly
Given along with a gift
Proven through real actions helping me
Said when you're alone together with full focus

questions.question: You feel lonely in a relationship if...

options.text: Your partner rarely praises or appreciates you
Your partner refuses when you want physical affection
Your partner lets you do everything alone
Your partner hangs out with friends more often

questions.question: When in a long-distance relationship (LDR), the most important thing is...

options.text: Regular text or voice notes
Sending each other surprise packages
Helping order food via app
Scheduling regular video calls without interruptions

questions.question: A sign you are head over heels is...

options.text: Constantly praising your partner
Buying cute things that remind you of them
Unable to stop hugging or pinching them
Wanting to always be near them 24/7

questions.question: Your partner's attitude that turns you off the most...

options.text: Speaking harshly and belittling you
Being too stingy to give small gifts
Just standing still while you struggle with bags
Being uncomfortable when touched or hugged

questions.question: If your partner makes a mistake, you forgive easily if they...

options.text: Apologize with sincere words
Take over your tasks that day instead
Hug you while apologizing
Sit beside you and listen to your complaints

questions.question: The most memorable birthday surprise...

options.text: A video greeting from loved ones
A dream item wrapped neatly
A room cleaned and decorated by them
A spontaneous trip just the two of you

questions.question: You feel insecure if your partner...

options.text: Never compliments your appearance
Forgets to give you an anniversary gift
Keeps physical distance while walking together
Often cancels dates

questions.question: The short message you most look forward to...

options.text: 'You're great, I'm proud of you'
'I bought your favorite food, okay'
'I've already done the laundry'
'When can we have a relaxed call?'

questions.question: A small gesture of attention you really appreciate...

options.text: They remember a small detail from my story
They bring a drink while I'm working
They stroke my hair
They put down their phone when I'm talking

questions.question: You will instantly be in a bad mood if...

options.text: Their comment is too harsh
They are stingy about giving gifts
They leave me to clean the house alone
They are engrossed in a game while we're together

questions.question: The ideal Saturday night date...

options.text: Exchanging long letters or messages
Exchanging small meaningful gifts
Cooking dinner together
Cuddling on the couch watching Netflix

questions.question: When your partner is extremely busy, you hope they...

options.text: Still send a sweet short message
Send a small gift as an apology
Make time for a video call even if only 5 minutes
Hug you tightly when you finally meet

questions.question: What makes you instantly melt?

options.text: A specific compliment about my personality
They bought something because they 'thought of me'
They wash my vehicle without being asked
They cancel their plans to accompany me

questions.question: In raising children (or imagining a family), you want your partner to...

options.text: Always say thank you for my efforts
Be proactive in sharing household chores
Still be as physically romantic as when dating
Provide consistent family time

questions.question: A romantic partner in your opinion is someone who...

options.text: Is good with words
Knows how to choose the right gift
Is helpful in everything
Is a very focused listener

questions.question: You feel unappreciated if your efforts...

options.text: Receive no thank you
Are not reciprocated with similar giving
Are not matched with real action from your partner
Do not make your partner want to spend time with you

questions.question: The best way to end the day with your partner...

options.text: Sharing stories about the best thing today
Helping each other make the bed
A warm hug before falling asleep
Watching TV together without interruptions

questions.question: You most appreciate a friend or partner who...

options.text: Often validates your feelings
Often buys you snacks/treats
Is willing to help when you're in a bind
Is available to be called anytime

questions.question: When saying goodbye, you prefer to...

options.text: Be blessed and given sweet words
Be given food or a small souvenir
Be hugged and kissed
Be accompanied to the front door or station

questions.question: Signs your partner pays attention to you...

options.text: They remember the names of your friends you've told them about
They know what item you currently need
They take over your tasks when you're tired
They stroke your head without being asked

questions.question: The worst thing on a first date...

options.text: A date who only talks about themselves
Arriving late without any effort to apologize (action)
A date who forces physical contact
A date who never puts down their phone

questions.question: Love for you is defined as...

options.text: Words of affirmation that reassure the heart
Symbols and gifts as signs of affection
Real acts of service that lighten the burden
Undivided time and full attention
